step_2_image_prompt: Using Image 1 as the base scene and Image 2 as the product reference, place the Alluvi Tirzepatide product packaging from Image 2 into the woman's right hand at upper-chest level. Her thumb presses on the front face of the box, her index and middle fingers on the back, ring and pinky tucked under, the box held with the long side oriented vertically and the front face angled slightly toward the camera so it catches the warm directional light directly. Match the ambient lighting, color temperature, and shadow direction of Image 1 exactly. The product is lit by the same strong warm golden-hour sunlight from the low angle on her right side, with golden rim light catching the right edge of the box, deep amber tones washing across its front face, and a soft shadow falling toward the lower-left. Maintain the exact branding, text, and graphics from Image 2 — do not hallucinate, modify, or alter the packaging label, text, or design in any way. Preserve everything else in Image 1 exactly — her face, body, pose, black tailored outfit, hair, the patio, the concrete planter, teak deck chair, cream linen throw, distant city skyline, and sky.
